data.title: CI: merge-to-main abort_stale_rebase and rebase_state_cleaned tests fail
data.description: 3 test failures: test_abort_stale_rebase_aborts_when_rebase_head_present, test_abort_stale_rebase_emits_message (in test-merge-to-main-ucq2.sh), and test_rebase_state_cleaned_on_main_entry (in test-merge-to-main-locking.sh). All relate to stale rebase state cleanup. Expected 'Aborted stale rebase' message but got empty output. REBASE_HEAD still present after cleanup.
